title: Beetroot and Bittersweet French Fries
description: Crispy French fries with a twist of bittersweet and earthy beetroot flavor. Perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Cut the beetroot into small cubes and set aside.
Cut the French fries into desired shape and size.
In a bowl, mix together beetroot cubes and French fries.
Drizzle olive oil over the mixture and toss to combine.
Sprinkle salt and black pepper to taste.
Spread the mixture on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy.
Melt bittersweet chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Once the French fries are crispy, remove from the oven and drizzle with melted chocolate.
